request: Break down our products by their category.
search_document:
User Request: Break down our products by their category.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products by Category
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products across different categories
Title: Category Summary
Type: table
Description: Summary of products in each category including counts and average prices
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available

sql_queries.title: Products by Category
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Category Summary
sql_queries.description: Summary of products in each category including counts and average prices
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount, AVG(p.UnitPrice) AS AveragePrice FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
